observations.archetype_gloss: Deity of Curiosity, thematic hyperlink for Truth and Love
observations.summary: The narrator acts as a Wise Guide, providing subtle, overarching thematic insight and foreshadowing, embodying curiosity and ancient knowledge.

evidence.quote: The laugh that followed was the sound of mountains of bedrock grinding against each other in the deeps of the earth—slow, foundational, utterly certain it would arrive.
